rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Suspicious Process Lineage (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Suspicious Process Lineage (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 03fd0ccb-e246-451d-9923-f0698642a0ec
status: experimental
description: Detects the WMI provider host spawning suspicious processes. Part of
  the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \wmiprvse.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \msbuild.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    - \mshta.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
